content.stem: Personal Questions — The examiner will ask you some questions about yourself.
content.prompt: Answer the examiner's questions about your personal information. Give short, clear answers. You can add extra details if you want.
examiner_questions: What's your name?
How old are you?
Where do you go to school?
What do you like to do after school?
Do you have any hobbies?
content.sample_answer: My name is Li Ming. I'm twelve years old. I go to Sunshine Middle School. After school, I usually play basketball with my friends. My hobby is drawing — I like to draw animals and cartoon characters.
content.tips_zh: 回答个人信息问题时，尽量用完整的句子回答，不要只说一个词。可以适当补充一些细节，比如说爱好时可以说具体喜欢什么。保持自然、放松的语气。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第一部分，考官会问你一些关于个人信息的简单问题。回答时要用完整的句子，语速适中，发音清晰。可以适当扩展回答，展示你的英语能力。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 1, where the examiner asks simple personal questions. Answer in complete sentences at a steady pace with clear pronunciation. You can expand your answers slightly to show your English ability.

content.stem: Personal Questions — The examiner will ask you some questions about your family.
content.prompt: Answer the examiner's questions about your family. Give short, clear answers. Try to add one or two extra details.
examiner_questions: How many people are there in your family?
Do you have any brothers or sisters?
What does your mother or father do?
Do you often do things together as a family?
Who do you spend the most time with at home?
content.sample_answer: There are four people in my family — my parents, my younger sister, and me. My sister is eight years old. My father is a teacher and my mother works in a hospital. At weekends, we often go to the park together or watch films at home. I spend the most time with my sister because we share a bedroom.
content.tips_zh: 回答家庭相关问题时，可以说出家庭成员的具体信息（年龄、职业等）。使用简单的句式如 "There are... in my family" 和 "My father is a..."。不需要说太多，但每个回答最好有两到三句话。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第一部分，关于家庭的问题。考官想了解你的家庭情况。用简单清楚的句子回答，可以加入一些具体细节来丰富你的回答。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 1, with questions about your family. The examiner wants to learn about your family. Answer in simple, clear sentences and add specific details to enrich your responses.

content.stem: Personal Questions — The examiner will ask you some questions about food.
content.prompt: Answer the examiner's questions about food and eating. Give short, clear answers. Try to explain your reasons.
examiner_questions: What is your favourite food?
Can you cook? What can you make?
Do you prefer eating at home or in a restaurant?
What do you usually have for breakfast?
Is there any food you don't like?
content.sample_answer: My favourite food is noodles because they're really delicious. I can cook a little — I can make fried rice and scrambled eggs. I prefer eating at home because my mum's cooking is the best. For breakfast, I usually have bread and milk. I don't like bitter melon because it tastes too bitter.
content.tips_zh: 回答关于食物的问题时，使用 "because" 来解释原因。可以用简单的形容词描述食物，如 "delicious"、"tasty"、"sweet"。说自己不喜欢的食物时，也可以说明原因。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第一部分，关于食物的问题。考官想了解你的饮食习惯和喜好。注意使用与食物相关的词汇和简单的形容词来描述味道。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 1, with questions about food. The examiner wants to learn about your eating habits and preferences. Use food-related vocabulary and simple adjectives to describe tastes.

content.stem: Personal Questions — The examiner will ask you some questions about sports and exercise.
content.prompt: Answer the examiner's questions about sports. Give short, clear answers. Try to give reasons for your opinions.
examiner_questions: Do you like sports?
What sport do you play or watch?
How often do you do exercise?
Do you prefer team sports or individual sports?
Have you ever been to a sports event?
content.sample_answer: Yes, I like sports very much. I play badminton every week with my friends. I exercise about three times a week, usually after school. I prefer team sports because I enjoy playing with other people. Last year, I went to a basketball game with my dad. It was very exciting.
content.tips_zh: 回答运动相关问题时，可以说频率（every week, three times a week），也可以说原因（because I enjoy...）。如果被问到过去的经历，记得用过去时态（I went, It was）。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第一部分，关于运动的问题。考官想了解你的运动习惯。注意使用频率表达（how often）和原因表达（because）。如果提到过去的事，要用过去时态。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 1, with questions about sports. The examiner wants to learn about your exercise habits. Use frequency expressions (how often) and reason expressions (because). Use past tenses when talking about past events.

content.stem: Personal Questions — The examiner will ask you some questions about your weekends.
content.prompt: Answer the examiner's questions about what you do at the weekend. Give short, clear answers with some details.
examiner_questions: What do you usually do at the weekend?
Do you prefer staying at home or going out?
Who do you spend your weekends with?
What did you do last weekend?
What would you like to do next weekend?
content.sample_answer: At the weekend, I usually sleep late and then do my homework in the morning. I prefer going out because I like fresh air. I usually spend weekends with my family or my best friend. Last weekend, I went to a bookshop and bought a new story book. Next weekend, I'd like to go to the cinema with my friends.
content.tips_zh: 回答周末相关问题时，注意区分时态：通常做什么（现在时），上周末做了什么（过去时），下周末想做什么（would like to / want to）。每个回答加一两个细节就够了。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第一部分，关于周末活动的问题。注意使用不同的时态：一般现在时（usually do）描述习惯、一般过去时（did, went）描述上周末、"would like to" 描述下周末的计划。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 1, with questions about weekends. Pay attention to different tenses: present simple (usually do) for habits, past simple (did, went) for last weekend, and 'would like to' for next weekend plans.

content.stem: Personal Questions — The examiner will ask you some questions about your friends.
content.prompt: Answer the examiner's questions about your friends. Give short, clear answers. Add details about what you do together.
examiner_questions: Do you have a best friend?
How did you meet your best friend?
What do you like doing together?
How often do you see your friends?
What makes a good friend?
content.sample_answer: Yes, my best friend is called Wang Lei. We met at school when we were seven years old. We like playing computer games and riding bikes together. I see my friends every day at school and sometimes at weekends too. I think a good friend is someone who is kind and who listens to you.
content.tips_zh: 回答关于朋友的问题时，可以说出朋友的名字、你们怎么认识的、一起做什么。最后一个问题是开放性问题，用 "I think..." 表达你的看法。保持自然的语气。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第一部分，关于朋友的问题。考官想了解你的社交生活。注意 "How did you meet" 需要用过去时态回答。最后的问题可以用 "I think..." 来表达个人看法。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 1, with questions about friends. The examiner wants to learn about your social life. Note that 'How did you meet' requires past tense answers. For the last question, use 'I think...' to express personal opinions.

content.stem: Personal Questions — The examiner will ask you some questions about school life.
content.prompt: Answer the examiner's questions about your school. Give short, clear answers. Try to explain why.
examiner_questions: What is your favourite subject at school?
What subject do you find difficult?
How do you get to school every day?
What do you do during your lunch break?
Do you like your school? Why or why not?
content.sample_answer: My favourite subject is English because I like learning new words. I find maths quite difficult, especially when we do problems with lots of numbers. I go to school by bus every day — it takes about twenty minutes. During lunch break, I eat with my friends in the canteen and then we play in the playground. Yes, I like my school because the teachers are nice and I have many friends there.
content.tips_zh: 回答学校相关问题时，用 "because" 解释原因。描述学科可以用 "I like... because..." 和 "I find... difficult"。描述日常习惯用一般现在时。记住对每个问题给出完整的回答。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第一部分，关于学校生活的问题。考官想了解你对学校的感受。注意用 "because" 给出原因，用 "I find... difficult" 表达觉得什么困难。描述日常习惯用一般现在时。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 1, with questions about school life. The examiner wants to know your feelings about school. Use 'because' for reasons, 'I find... difficult' to express difficulty. Use present simple for daily routines.

content.stem: Personal Questions — The examiner will ask you some questions about holidays and travel.
content.prompt: Answer the examiner's questions about holidays. Give short, clear answers. Share some details about your experiences.
examiner_questions: Do you like going on holiday?
Where did you go for your last holiday?
Do you prefer the beach or the mountains?
What do you like to do when you are on holiday?
Where would you like to go in the future?
content.sample_answer: Yes, I really like going on holiday. Last summer, I went to Hainan with my family. I prefer the beach because I love swimming in the sea. When I'm on holiday, I like visiting new places and trying different food. In the future, I'd like to go to London because I want to see Big Ben and practise my English.
content.tips_zh: 回答假期相关问题时，注意时态的变化：过去的假期用过去时（I went），一般喜好用现在时（I prefer），将来的计划用 "I'd like to" 或 "I want to"。可以加入具体的地点和活动让回答更丰富。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第一部分，关于假期和旅行的问题。考官想了解你的旅行经历和计划。注意使用不同时态：过去时描述过去的假期，现在时表达喜好，"would like to" 表达未来的愿望。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 1, with questions about holidays and travel. The examiner wants to know about your travel experiences and plans. Use different tenses: past for previous holidays, present for preferences, and 'would like to' for future wishes.

content.stem: Personal Questions — The examiner will ask you some questions about your home.
content.prompt: Answer the examiner's questions about where you live. Give short, clear answers. Describe your home and your neighbourhood.
examiner_questions: Do you live in a house or a flat?
How many rooms are there in your home?
What is your favourite room? Why?
Is your neighbourhood a nice place to live?
What would you change about your home?
content.sample_answer: I live in a flat with my family. There are three bedrooms, a living room, a kitchen, and a bathroom. My favourite room is my bedroom because I have all my books and toys there. Yes, my neighbourhood is nice — there is a park nearby and a supermarket. If I could change something, I would like to have a garden so I can play outside.
content.tips_zh: 描述家的问题时，使用 "There is/are" 描述房间，"My favourite room is... because..." 表达喜好和原因。描述社区可以说附近有什么设施。用 "I would like to..." 表达想要改变的事情。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第一部分，关于你的家的问题。考官想了解你住在哪里以及你的家是什么样的。用 "There is/are" 描述房间，用 "because" 解释喜好的原因。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 1, with questions about your home. The examiner wants to know where you live and what your home is like. Use 'There is/are' for rooms and 'because' to explain preferences.

content.stem: Personal Questions — The examiner will ask you some questions about music.
content.prompt: Answer the examiner's questions about music. Give short, clear answers. Share your musical tastes and experiences.
examiner_questions: What kind of music do you like?
Do you play a musical instrument?
How often do you listen to music?
Who is your favourite singer or band?
Do you like singing? Why or why not?
content.sample_answer: I like pop music because it makes me feel happy. I don't play any instrument, but I'd like to learn the piano one day. I listen to music every day, usually when I'm doing my homework. My favourite singer is Jay Chou because his songs are really good. Yes, I like singing, but I'm not very good at it! I sometimes sing in the shower.
content.tips_zh: 回答音乐相关问题时，说出具体的音乐类型和歌手名字。使用频率表达如 "every day"、"sometimes"。用 "because" 解释为什么喜欢某种音乐或歌手。可以加入有趣的细节让回答更生动。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第一部分，关于音乐的问题。考官想了解你的音乐品味。说出具体的音乐类型和歌手，使用频率副词描述听音乐的习惯，用 "because" 给出喜好的理由。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 1, with questions about music. The examiner wants to know your musical tastes. Name specific music types and artists, use frequency adverbs for listening habits, and 'because' for reasons behind preferences.

content.stem: Personal Questions — The examiner will ask you some questions about animals and pets.
content.prompt: Answer the examiner's questions about animals and pets. Give short, clear answers. Share your opinions and experiences.
examiner_questions: Do you have a pet?
What is your favourite animal? Why?
Would you like to have a pet? What kind?
Have you ever been to a zoo?
Do you think animals are important? Why?
content.sample_answer: No, I don't have a pet, but I'd really like one. My favourite animal is the dog because they are friendly and loyal. I'd like to have a golden retriever because they are gentle and good with children. Yes, I went to the zoo last year and I saw pandas and giraffes. Yes, I think animals are very important because they are part of nature and they make people happy.
content.tips_zh: 回答关于动物的问题时，使用形容词描述动物特征，如 "friendly"、"loyal"、"gentle"。用 "because" 解释原因。描述过去经历用过去时态。用 "I'd like to..." 表达愿望。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第一部分，关于动物和宠物的问题。用形容词描述动物的特征，用 "because" 解释为什么喜欢某种动物。描述过去的经历要用过去时态。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 1, with questions about animals and pets. Use adjectives to describe animal characteristics, 'because' to explain preferences. Use past tenses for past experiences.

content.stem: Personal Questions — The examiner will ask you some questions about reading.
content.prompt: Answer the examiner's questions about books and reading. Give short, clear answers with reasons.
examiner_questions: Do you like reading?
What kind of books do you like?
How often do you read?
What is the best book you have ever read?
Do you prefer reading on paper or on a screen?
content.sample_answer: Yes, I like reading very much. I like adventure stories and science fiction because they are very exciting. I try to read every day before I go to sleep. The best book I have ever read is Harry Potter because the story is magical and the characters are interesting. I prefer reading on paper because it's easier on my eyes and I like the feeling of holding a real book.
content.tips_zh: 回答关于阅读的问题时，说出具体的书名和类型。使用 "because" 给出理由。描述频率用 "every day"、"sometimes" 等。比较两个选项时用 "I prefer... because..."。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第一部分，关于阅读的问题。说出具体喜欢的书的类型和书名，使用频率表达描述阅读习惯，用 "because" 解释喜好的原因。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 1, with questions about reading. Name specific book types and titles, use frequency expressions for reading habits, and 'because' to explain preferences.

content.stem: Personal Questions — The examiner will ask you some questions about shopping.
content.prompt: Answer the examiner's questions about shopping. Give short, clear answers. Share what you like and don't like about shopping.
examiner_questions: Do you like shopping?
What do you like to buy?
Where do you usually go shopping?
Do you prefer shopping online or in shops?
What was the last thing you bought?
content.sample_answer: Yes, I quite like shopping, especially for books and clothes. I usually go to the shopping centre near my school with my friends. I prefer shopping in real shops because I like to try things on and see them before I buy. The last thing I bought was a notebook for school — it has a nice blue cover.
content.tips_zh: 回答购物问题时，说出你喜欢买什么、在哪里买。比较购物方式时用 "I prefer... because..."。描述最近买的东西用过去时态。可以加入一些细节让回答更有趣。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第一部分，关于购物的问题。考官想了解你的购物习惯和偏好。用 "I prefer... because..." 比较不同的购物方式，用过去时态描述最近一次购物。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 1, with questions about shopping. The examiner wants to know your shopping habits and preferences. Use 'I prefer... because...' to compare shopping methods and past tenses for recent purchases.

content.stem: Personal Questions — The examiner will ask you some questions about your daily routine.
content.prompt: Answer the examiner's questions about your typical day. Give short, clear answers. Include times and activities.
examiner_questions: What time do you usually wake up?
What do you do in the morning before school?
How do you spend your evenings?
What time do you go to bed?
Is your routine different at weekends?
content.sample_answer: I usually wake up at half past six. Before school, I brush my teeth, get dressed, and have breakfast. I usually have cereal and orange juice. In the evening, I do my homework first, then I watch TV or read a book. I go to bed at about ten o'clock. Yes, at weekends I wake up much later, at about nine o'clock, and I have more free time to play.
content.tips_zh: 描述日常生活时，按时间顺序说明你做了什么。使用时间表达如 "at half past six"、"at about ten o'clock"。用 "first"、"then" 来连接不同的活动。周末和平日的区别可以用 "At weekends, I..." 来对比。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第一部分，关于日常生活的问题。按时间顺序描述你的一天，使用时间表达和顺序词。注意用一般现在时描述日常习惯。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 1, with questions about your daily routine. Describe your day in time order using time expressions and sequence words. Use present simple for daily habits.

content.stem: Personal Questions — The examiner will ask you some questions about television and films.
content.prompt: Answer the examiner's questions about TV and films. Give short, clear answers. Explain your preferences.
examiner_questions: How often do you watch television?
What kind of programmes do you like to watch?
What is the best film you have ever seen?
Do you prefer watching TV alone or with your family?
Do you think children watch too much TV?
content.sample_answer: I watch television almost every day, usually for about an hour after dinner. I like to watch cartoons and nature programmes because they are interesting. The best film I have ever seen is Toy Story because it's funny and the story is great. I prefer watching films with my family because we can talk about them together. Yes, I think some children watch too much TV. It's better to go outside and play sometimes.
content.tips_zh: 回答关于电视和电影的问题时，说出具体的节目类型和影片名称。使用频率表达如 "almost every day"。表达观点时用 "I think..." 和 "because"。比较时用 "I prefer... because..."。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第一部分，关于电视和电影的问题。说出你喜欢的节目类型和电影名称，使用频率副词和 "because" 来表达你的喜好和观点。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 1, with questions about TV and films. Name specific programme types and film titles, use frequency adverbs and 'because' to express preferences and opinions.

content.stem: Personal Questions — The examiner will ask you some questions about the weather and seasons.
content.prompt: Answer the examiner's questions about weather and seasons. Give short, clear answers with reasons.
examiner_questions: What is your favourite season? Why?
What is the weather like today?
What do you like to do when it's sunny?
Do you like rainy days? Why or why not?
What kind of weather do you dislike?
content.sample_answer: My favourite season is autumn because the weather is cool and the leaves change colour — it's very beautiful. Today the weather is cloudy and a bit cold. When it's sunny, I like to go to the park and play outside with my friends. I don't really like rainy days because I can't go outside and I have to stay at home. I dislike very hot weather because it makes me feel tired.
content.tips_zh: 回答天气和季节问题时，使用描述天气的形容词如 "sunny"、"cloudy"、"rainy"、"hot"、"cold"。用 "because" 解释原因。描述在不同天气下做什么活动。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第一部分，关于天气和季节的问题。使用天气相关的形容词来描述，用 "because" 给出理由，说明在不同天气下你喜欢做什么。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 1, with questions about weather and seasons. Use weather-related adjectives, 'because' for reasons, and describe what activities you enjoy in different weather.

content.stem: Personal Questions — The examiner will ask you some questions about learning English.
content.prompt: Answer the examiner's questions about learning English. Give short, clear answers. Talk about your learning experience.
examiner_questions: How long have you been learning English?
Do you think English is easy or difficult?
What is the hardest part of learning English?
How do you practise English outside school?
Why do you think learning English is important?
content.sample_answer: I have been learning English for about five years, since I was seven. I think English is sometimes difficult, but also fun. The hardest part is pronunciation because some English words are difficult to say. I practise English by watching English cartoons and listening to English songs. I think learning English is important because it helps me talk to people from other countries and I can understand English films and books.
content.tips_zh: 回答学英语相关问题时，用 "I have been learning... for..." 描述学习时长。说明困难时用 "The hardest part is... because..."。列举练习方法时用 "by + doing"。说重要性时用 "because" 给出理由。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第一部分，关于学习英语的问题。使用 "I have been learning...for..." 描述学习经历，用 "because" 解释原因，用 "by doing..." 描述学习方法。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 1, with questions about learning English. Use 'I have been learning...for...' for your experience, 'because' for reasons, and 'by doing...' for practice methods.

content.stem: Personal Questions — The examiner will ask you some questions about your neighbourhood.
content.prompt: Answer the examiner's questions about the area where you live. Give short, clear answers. Describe what is near your home.
examiner_questions: What is your neighbourhood like?
What is there to do near your home?
Are there any shops or restaurants near your home?
Is your neighbourhood quiet or noisy?
What do you like best about where you live?
content.sample_answer: My neighbourhood is quite nice and modern. There is a park and a sports centre near my home, so I can play outside and do exercise. Yes, there are several shops and a few restaurants near my home — my favourite is a noodle restaurant. My neighbourhood is usually quiet, but it can be noisy at weekends when people go shopping. What I like best about where I live is that it's near my school, so I can walk there in ten minutes.
content.tips_zh: 描述社区时，使用 "There is/are" 说明有什么设施。用形容词如 "quiet"、"noisy"、"nice" 描述环境。用 "What I like best is..." 表达最喜欢的方面。可以加入具体的例子让描述更丰富。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第一部分，关于你住的地方的问题。用 "There is/are" 描述附近的设施，用形容词描述环境特点，用 "What I like best is..." 表达你最喜欢的方面。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 1, with questions about your neighbourhood. Use 'There is/are' for nearby facilities, adjectives for the environment, and 'What I like best is...' for your favourite aspect.

content.stem: Personal Questions — The examiner will ask you some questions about using technology.
content.prompt: Answer the examiner's questions about technology. Give short, clear answers. Talk about how you use technology.
examiner_questions: Do you have a phone or a tablet?
What do you use your phone for?
How often do you use a computer?
Do you play computer games? Which ones?
Do your parents let you use the internet freely?
content.sample_answer: Yes, I have a phone. I use it to send messages to my friends, take photos, and listen to music. I use a computer about three times a week, usually for homework. Yes, I play computer games sometimes — my favourite is Minecraft because I like building things. No, my parents have rules. I can use the internet for one hour on school days, but more at weekends.
content.tips_zh: 回答科技相关问题时，具体说明你用手机或电脑做什么，使用 "I use it to..." 来列举用途。描述频率用 "about three times a week" 等表达。说父母规定时用 "I can..." 或 "I'm allowed to..."。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第一部分，关于使用科技的问题。具体说明你使用手机和电脑的用途，使用频率表达和规则描述，用 "I use it to..." 来列举。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 1, with questions about technology. Specify what you use devices for, use frequency expressions, and describe rules with 'I can...' or 'I'm allowed to...'.

content.stem: Personal Questions — The examiner will ask you some questions about helping at home.
content.prompt: Answer the examiner's questions about helping at home. Give short, clear answers about your responsibilities.
examiner_questions: Do you help with housework at home?
What jobs do you do at home?
Do you enjoy helping at home? Why or why not?
Who does most of the housework in your family?
What housework would you never like to do?
content.sample_answer: Yes, I help with housework at home. I tidy my room, wash the dishes after dinner, and sometimes I help hang up the clothes. I don't mind helping at home because it makes my parents happy. My mum does most of the housework, but my dad helps with the cooking. I would never like to clean the toilet because I think that's the worst job!
content.tips_zh: 回答家务相关问题时，列举具体的家务活动，如 "tidy my room"、"wash the dishes"。用 "I don't mind..." 表示不介意，"I would never like to..." 表达不愿意做的事。可以加入幽默的细节让回答更有趣。

explanation_zh: 这是KET口语第一部分，关于在家帮忙的问题。列举你在家做的家务，表达你对家务的态度。用 "I don't mind..." 和 "I would never like to..." 表达不同程度的喜好。
explanation_en: This is KET Speaking Part 1, with questions about helping at home. List specific chores you do, express your attitude towards housework using 'I don't mind...' and 'I would never like to...' for varying preferences.
